completed_tasks.name: spec-phase: write SPEC.md with 8 locked requirements
discuss-phase: gather context with 14 implementation decisions

remaining_tasks.name: plan-phase: create executable plans for MCP implementation

decisions.rationale: Models are well-defined and SIF-specific; rewriting adds no value
Better testability and clarity than functional handlers
Safety first, no concurrency issues with SQLite

decisions.decision: async SearchBackend with sync sqlite3 wrapped in executor
decisions.rationale: Matches async transport semantics while reusing sync searchers
Balances safety (new DB connections) with performance (cached models)

decisions.decision: Full MCP lifecycle implementation (initialize → tools/list → tools/call)
Tiered error handling: fatal→exit, recoverable→JSON-RPC error
decisions.rationale: Clean failure for unrecoverable, graceful for recoverable
New MCP standard replaces deprecated HTTP+SSE

decisions.decision: No backwards compatibility with old HTTP+SSE transport
decisions.rationale: Simplify implementation, new standard is sufficient

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 9 to create executable plans for MCP implementation
